other_findings.finding: Inflammatory monocytes are CD14bright CD64bright CD163- mononuclear phagocytes distinct from tissue-resident macrophages
Inf_mono represents a cell state molecularly defined in the Reynolds et al. 2021 adult skin atlas, identified among 34 cell states in healthy human skin
Inflammatory monocytes are recruited to skin during inflammation and are implicated in psoriasis and atopic dermatitis pathogenesis
other_findings.source_table: Mehta et al. 2021; Reynolds et al. 2021

other_findings.finding: Adult skin fibroblasts express high levels of inflammatory cytokines (IL6, IL1RA) and genes for antigen presentation (HLA-A) and innate immune responses (CD55, PTGES) compared to prenatal skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Monocytes recently recruited to inflamed skin have been referred to as monocyte-derived dendritic cells (Mo-DC), inflammatory DC, inflammatory monocyte-like (Infl Mo-like) cells, inflammatory Mf (Inf mac), or monocyte-derived Mf (Monomac) highlighting a need to better define their molecular identities and function
evidence_quotes.context: Nomenclature of inflammatory monocyte-derived cells in skin

evidence_quotes.quote: Monomacs displaying a monocyte-like molecular signature (CD14, S100A8, S100A9) comprise a mixture of Infl Mo-like MNP_1 and MNP_2 clusters identified by FCM
evidence_quotes.context: Molecular signature of inflammatory monocyte-like cells in skin

evidence_quotes.quote: a cell state molecularly defined as Inf mac, but not Mac2 or Monomac, is a major subset that significantly increased in L psoriasis skin
evidence_quotes.context: Expansion of inflammatory monocyte-like cells in psoriatic lesional skin

evidence_quotes.quote: cluster nine expressed S100A8, S100A9 and S100A12 together with VCAN and FCN1, identifying them as classical CD14 + monocytes
evidence_quotes.context: Marker genes defining classical CD14+ monocytes in consensus myeloid cell map

evidence_quotes.quote: Blood monocytes that are attracted to wounds are classified into classical or pro-inflammatory CD14 + CD16 - monocytes and anti-inflammatory CD14 low/- CD16 + monocytes
evidence_quotes.context: Classification of monocyte subsets in skin wound healing

evidence_quotes.quote: dermal monocytes are specifically primed to become immunomodulatory cells that express classic inflammatory and regulatory cytokines
evidence_quotes.context: Fate of monocytes recruited to dermis

evidence_quotes.quote: All adult fibroblast subsets expressed high levels of inflammatory cytokines and receptors (for example, IL6 and IL1RA) and genes involved in antigen presentation (for example, HLA-A), innate immune and inflammatory responses (for example, CD55 and PTGES) and cellular senescence (CDKN1A)
evidence_quotes.context: Pro-inflammatory milieu of adult skin compared to prenatal skin
